reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a message "Hello! What is 2+2?", and verified the agent responded with "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut app with sidebar containing agent list.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260709-230631-3it7" agent in the sidebar — Navigation successful, agent page loaded with title "QA-20260709-230631-3it7 · Gamut".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" (visible in the status indicator).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully entered into the textbox.
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, session created with name "Math Question Helper Session".
Waited for agent response — Agent responded within 1 second, activity indicator showed "Working..." then completed with "Worked for 1s".
Verified response mentions "4" — Response correctly displays "4" as the answer to the math question 2+2.
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and response "4" clearly visible. Agent status is now "idle" after processing.
